items.headline: City Council to review Health and Safety Element of General Plan
items.summary: The City Council held a study session on Tuesday to discuss updates to the Health and Safety Element of Cupertino's 2015-2040 General Plan. This element addresses hazards, emergency preparedness, and public safety policies that shape land use and development decisions across the city.

items.headline: Rooftop solar and battery system permitted at N 13th St
items.summary: A $665,633 permit was issued for roof-mounted solar panels and battery storage at 875 N 13th St.

items.headline: Figure AI clears $1.3M office buildout in North San José
items.summary: The AI robotics company Figure AI received a permit for a $1.3 million tenant improvement at 3940 N 1st St.
